topStories.title: Trading in organs illegally in Kerala, with forged documents
topStories.summary: A State-wide raid held on May 8 exposed an extensive organ trade racket in which forged documents were used to bypass laws that plug loopholes in organ donation. Five cases were registered, nine people arrested, and fabricated documents seized. The illegal trade thrives on patients’ desperate need for transplant and the monetary benefits that come the donors’ way.

business.title: Chip startup Cerebras hits $80 bn in value in strong stock debut
business.summary: Shares of US chip startup Cerebras Systems surged Thursday in its trading debut, more than doubling at one point and hitting a market value of $80 billion. Shortly after 1730 GMT, Cerebras stood at $332.51, up around 80 percent on the Nasdaq exchange after earlier reaching $385.

business.title: Sebi proposes major overhaul of derivatives rules to simplify compliance for exchanges
business.summary: India's market regulator Sebi is proposing significant changes to derivatives trading rules. The aim is to make compliance easier for stock exchanges and clearing corporations. Several outdated rules will be removed, and operational requirements will be streamlined. These proposals are part of an initiative to improve the ease of doing business in the financial markets.

entertainment.title: Haarsh Limbachiyaa admits he felt ‘ajeeb’ marrying more successful Bharti Singh: ‘Had to reach her level some way’
entertainment.summary: Haarsh Limbachiyaa acknowledged initial discomfort regarding his relationship with Bharti Singh due to societal judgments about success.

entertainment.title: Mouni Roy confirms separation from Suraj Nambiar after 4 years of marriage; slam ‘sensationalised’ rumours
entertainment.summary: Mouni Roy and Suraj Nambiar confirmed on social media that they're going their separate ways after getting married in Goa in 2022.

entertainment.title: All shows for Suriya, Trisha Krishnan's Karuppu cancelled; Dhanush, Dulquer Salmaan say it ‘deserves proper release’
entertainment.summary: RJ Balaji's Suriya and Trisha Krishnan-starrer Karuppu will not hit screens as planned on May 14. Stars such as Dhanush and Dulquer Salmaan show support.

entertainment.title: The Batman Part 2: Matt Reeves confirms returning cast in Robert Pattinson superhero sequel, everything we know so far
entertainment.summary: Matt Reeves confirms the returning cast for The Batman Part II. Production is set to start soon, with a release date of October 1, 2027.
